description_long: This is a compact, modern cabin with a distinctive shed-style roof sloping from left to right, covered in brown shingles. The exterior walls are clad in vertical wooden planks, giving it a warm, natural appearance. The front facade features a large, horizontally-oriented rectangular window with two panes, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear side of the cabin is divided into two sections: one with a dark finish and a single wooden door, and the other with a lighter, textured surface. The interior is visible in one view, revealing a cozy open-plan living space with a kitchen, seating area, and minimalistic furnishings. The overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for urban or suburban settings.
description: A modern wooden cabin with a sloped shed roof, large front window, and a single rear door, featuring a minimalist and functional design.
description_view_0: The cabin's front side shows vertical wooden paneling and a large, two-pane rectangular window.
description_view_1: The cutaway view reveals the interior layout, including a kitchen, living area, and furnishings, with windows on both sides.
description_view_2: The left side of the cabin displays uninterrupted vertical wooden paneling and the full slope of the roof, with no windows or doors.
description_view_3: The rear side features a single wooden door on a dark panel and a contrasting light section, with no windows visible.
attribute_roof_type: shed roof with a single slope, covered in brown shingles and moderate overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: one large, horizontally-oriented rectangular window with two panes on the front facade; no other windows visible
attribute_door_placement: one single door located on the rear side, offset to the left within a dark panel section
